mano_cua.result_summary: macOS环境下Muya编辑器浮动工具栏所有10个图标（加粗/斜体/下划线/删除线/高亮/行内代码/上下标/链接/图片/清除格式）均正常显示，在100%-175%多个缩放级别下无空白、缺失或占位符。此bug为Windows平台特有问题，macOS上无法复现。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All icons are rendering correctly on macOS. The Windows-specific bug is NOT reproduced on macOS. All 10 toolbar icons (Bold, Italic, Underline, Strikethrough, Highlight/Mark, Inline Code, Superscript, Link, Image, Clear) display correctly across multiple zoom levels (100%, 125%, 150%, 175%).
